news.t: Janus Henderson Launches Asset-Backed Securities ETF (JABS)

overview.description: The Janus Henderson Asset-Backed Securities ETF (JABS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund actively invests in USD-denominated asset-backed securities rated A-.  It focuses on capital preservation and does not target any specific maturity or duration range. JABS was launched on Jul 22, 2025 and is issued by Janus Henderson.
